items.title: Former US Marine pilot loses appeal against extradition from Australia
items.dek: Daniel Duggan was arrested in 2022 over claims he illegally trained the Chinese military in South Africa.
items.body: Daniel Duggan was arrested in 2022 over claims he illegally trained the Chinese military in South Africa.

items.title: UCL talking points: Slot's bizarre choices, Bayern now favorites?
items.dek: Arne Slot's decision to start Alexander Isak backfired, badly. ESPN's Julien Laurens, Sam Marsden, Gab Marcotti and Sam Tighe weigh in on that and all the other
items.body: Arne Slot's decision to start Alexander Isak backfired, badly. ESPN's Julien Laurens, Sam Marsden, Gab Marcotti and Sam Tighe weigh in on that and all the other moments that mattered from the UCL quarterfinal second legs.

items.title: Maxey delivers late as Sixers lock up No. 7 seed
items.dek: Tyrese Maxey scored 31 points, and the Sixers pulled away late to top the Magic 109-97 on Wednesday night to secure the No. 7 seed in the Eastern Conference pla
items.body: Tyrese Maxey scored 31 points, and the Sixers pulled away late to top the Magic 109-97 on Wednesday night to secure the No. 7 seed in the Eastern Conference playoffs.
